summary: A 4-2-3-1 with three narrow 10s feeding crosses to Chris Wood, holding a solid rest-defence — but struggling in transition. Hard to read after easy qualification.
style: 4-2-3-1 — three narrow '10s', fullbacks high & wide, crosses into the box for Chris Wood, 2 CB & 2 CM holding the rest-defence.

counterReliance.note: Crossing side, and struggles in transition

keyPlayers.name: Elijah Just
keyPlayers.note: Creative 10 with goals & assists, a great two-footed dribbler and an excellent presser

tactics: Get fullbacks wide, work the three 10s and cross for Wood, with a holding block behind. Hard to gauge their level after easy qualification and a run of poor friendly results.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
